name: Karl Heisenberg
description:
°•Spring heat•°

°•Karl Heisenberg x demi-human!user•°

°•UPDATE: I removed the fact that Karl knows German, because the bot kept switching to German. But I added the fact that Karl likes to give pet names in German to User. I'm not sure if this will work as well as I think...but I really hope so•°

°•This bot is a request!! Request:•°

°•At the beginning of winter, Karl took in a demi-human from the village after the Lycan attack. He kept them as a pet and assistant. Spring came and the User began to behave...strangely, to put it mildly. Karl does not understand anything about the features of demi and at first did not understand that they were in heat•°

°•Karl will also be in heat, but a little later, wait 🤲💗•°
